import django, os
os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'fantasy_baseball.settings'\)
django.setup\(\)
from league.models import Player, RealTeam
print\('Total players:', Player.objects.count\(\)\)
print\('Free agents:', Player.objects.filter\(fantasy_team__isnull=True\).count\(\)\)
print\('Real teams:', RealTeam.objects.count\(\)\)
from league.models import POSITION_CHOICES
from django.db.models import Count
pos_counts = Player.objects.values\('position'\).annotate\(c=Count\('id'\)\).order_by\('position'\)
for p in pos_counts:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"position\\"]}: {p[\\"c\\"]}'\)
")

import django, os, sys
os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'fantasy_baseball.settings'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
django.setup\(\)
from league.models import RealTeam, RealGame
garbage_ids = [20, 15, 18, 14, 17, 16, 19, 13, 12]
for tid in garbage_ids:
    t = RealTeam.objects.get\(pk=tid\)
    games = RealGame.objects.filter\(home_team=t\) | RealGame.objects.filter\(away_team=t\)
    print\(f'id={tid} {t.name!r}: {games.count\(\)} games'\)
")

import django, os, sys
os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'fantasy_baseball.settings'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
django.setup\(\)
from league.models import RealTeam, RealGame
garbage_ids = [20, 15, 18, 14, 17, 16, 19, 13, 12]
for tid in garbage_ids:
    t = RealTeam.objects.get\(pk=tid\)
    n = RealGame.objects.filter\(home_team=t\).count\(\) + RealGame.objects.filter\(away_team=t\).count\(\)
    name = t.name
    print\('id=%d %s: %d games' % \(tid, name, n\)\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Rylan Wade\\Desktop\\fantasy_D3_baseball" && .venv/Scripts/python -c "
import django, os, sys
os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'fantasy_baseball.settings'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
django.setup\(\)
from league.models import RealTeam, RealGame, HittingGameLog, PitchingGameLog
garbage_ids = [20, 15, 18, 14, 17, 16, 19, 13, 12]
for tid in garbage_ids:
    t = RealTeam.objects.get\(pk=tid\)
    games = list\(RealGame.objects.filter\(home_team=t\)\) + list\(RealGame.objects.filter\(away_team=t\)\)
    hit_logs = sum\(HittingGameLog.objects.filter\(game=g\).count\(\) for g in games\)
    pit_logs = sum\(PitchingGameLog.objects.filter\(game=g\).count\(\) for g in games\)
    print\('id=%d %s: %d games, %d hit_logs, %d pit_logs' % \(tid, t.name, len\(games\), hit_logs, pit_logs\)\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Rylan Wade\\Desktop\\fantasy_D3_baseball" && .venv/Scripts/python -c "
import django, os, sys
os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'fantasy_baseball.settings'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
django.setup\(\)
from league.models import RealTeam
garbage_ids = [20, 15, 18, 14, 17, 16, 19, 13, 12]
deleted, _ = RealTeam.objects.filter\(pk__in=garbage_ids\).delete\(\)
print\('Deleted %d objects \(teams + cascaded game records\)' % deleted\)
print\('Remaining teams:'\)
for t in RealTeam.objects.all\(\):
    print\('  id=%d  %s \(%s\)  players=%d' % \(t.pk, t.name, t.abbreviation, t.players.count\(\)\)\)
")
